candidates.why: Direct match for total current assets on the balance sheet.
Balancing line, not the reported total; inferior to direct total current assets.
Non-current assets, not current assets.
Non-current balancing item, not total current assets.

variables.notes: Selected the explicit total current assets line.

candidates.why: Direct balance-sheet cash and cash equivalents line; best match for CHE.
Cash-related line but appears more like a component/alternate presentation; less preferred than explicit cash and cash equivalents.
Cash flow closing cash figure mirrors balance sheet cash, but CHE should come from the balance sheet when available.
Beginning cash balance, not period-end balance sheet cash.

candidates.row_label: Net effect of exchange rate fluctuations on cash and cash equivalents
candidates.why: FX adjustment, not the cash balance.

variables.notes: Used the balance sheet cash balance as required.

candidates.why: Direct match for total current liabilities on the balance sheet.
Only a component/partial subtotal, not total current liabilities.
Balancing line, not the reported total.
Non-current liabilities, not current liabilities.
Non-current subtotal, not current liabilities.
Non-current balancing item, not current liabilities.
Current section contains a current financial liabilities line, which is the closest match to short-term debt/current borrowings. Excludes the separate lease liabilities row if taken alone.
Current lease liabilities are explicitly excluded from STD under the baseline rule.
Operating liabilities, not debt.
Taxes payable, not debt.

variables.notes: Chose the current-section 'Financial liabilities' row as short-term debt. The statement separately reports 'Lease liabilities', so selecting only 'Financial liabilities' best matches STD while excluding leases and avoiding double counting.

candidates.why: Direct match for taxes payable/current tax liabilities.
Direct reported PPE line on the balance sheet; preferred total/net PPE measure.
Only a gross subcomponent of PPE, not total PPE.

candidates.row_label: Property, Plant & Equipment - Other - Accumulated Depreciation & Impairment
candidates.why: Contra-asset subcomponent, not PPE total.

candidates.row_label: Revenue from the sale of property, plant and equipment
candidates.why: Cash flow line, not balance sheet PPE stock.

candidates.row_label: Acquisition of property, plant and equipment
candidates.why: Capital expenditure flow, not PPE stock.

variables.notes: Used the direct balance sheet PPE line.

candidates.why: Direct match for total assets on the balance sheet.

candidates.row_label: Net cash flow from operating activities
candidates.why: Direct match for operating cash flow / net cash from operating activities.

final_choice.row_label: Net cash flow from operating activities

variables.notes: Direct operating cash flow line from cash flow statement.
